resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Pass/fail determination per item' but did not provide sufficient evidence to confirm this requirement. The evidence primarily focuses on a specific scenario involving a forklift, which does not encompass the broader need for pass/fail determinations across all inspection items as outlined in the linked use case. The absence of concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to the pass/fail determination for all required items indicates a gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence of pass/fail determination for all inspection items as required.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for pass/fail determination
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that each inspection item has a pass/fail status recorded.
